ideation: This sequence aims to mimic a cat's playful behavior, using gentle arm movements. The animation will start with both arms at rest, then transition to a slow, deliberate raising of both arms, pausing briefly before gently lowering them. This conveys a sense of curiosity and playful alertness, fitting for a cat. The final frame returns to the resting position. To ensure smooth transitions, I will use small increments in joint angles and maintain a consistent tempo. I will also check the existing examples to ensure the arm movements stay within the robot's capabilities and look natural.

frames.beat: arms slowly lift, curious and alert
arms rise higher, a playful stretch begins
arms begin to lower, playful energy wanes
arms rest again, the cat settles down for a moment
